title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: The idea that we’d be {{c1::investing 1% of GDP}}(投入占GDP的百分之一) in AI, I feel like it would have felt like a bigger deal, whereas {{c2::right now it just feels}}(目前感觉就是)... Ilya Sutskever
original: The idea that we’d be investing 1% of GDP in AI, I feel like it would have felt like a bigger deal, whereas right now it just feels... Ilya Sutskever
translation: 以前，如果说我们要把GDP的1%投入到AI领域，我觉得那会是一个更重大的事件，但现在感觉就……（Ilya Sutskever）
note:
phrases: investing 1% of GDP | right now it just feels
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0001_366c72
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: strong_collocation | concession_contrast
transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.
expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: {{c1::How to reconcile the fact}}(如何调和这个事实) that they are doing so well on evals? You look at the evals and you go, “Those are pretty hard evals.”
original: How to reconcile the fact that they are doing so well on evals? You look at the evals and you go, “Those are pretty hard evals.”
translation: 他们能在评估测试（evals）上表现得这么好，这怎么能调和？你看看这些评估，就会觉得：“这些测试可真难啊。”
note:
phrases: How to reconcile the fact
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0004_b5466e
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: concession_contrast
transfer: Useful for acknowledging a point before pivoting to contrast.
expression_transfer: Useful for acknowledging a point before pivoting to contrast.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Isn’t it straight out of science fiction? Dwarkesh Patel {{c1::Another thing that’s crazy}}(还有一件很疯狂的事情) is how normal the slow takeoff feels.
original: Isn’t it straight out of science fiction? Dwarkesh Patel Another thing that’s crazy is how normal the slow takeoff feels.
translation: 这难道不是科幻小说里的情节吗？Dwarkesh Patel补充说，另一个让人觉得很疯狂的点是，这种“缓慢起飞”的感觉竟然如此正常。
note:
phrases: Another thing that’s crazy
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0001_366c72
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: discourse_organizer
transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.
expression_transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But the {{c1::economic impact seems}}(经济影响看起来/似乎) to be dramatically behind. It’s very difficult to {{c2::make sense of}}(理解/弄明白), how can the model, on the one hand, do these amazing things, and then on the other hand, repeat itself twice in some situation?
original: But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind. It’s very difficult to make sense of, how can the model, on the one hand, do these amazing things, and then on the other hand, repeat itself twice in some situation?
translation: 但经济影响似乎却大大落后了。这很难理解：模型一方面能做到这些惊人的事情，但另一方面，在某些情况下，它却只是重复自己两次？
note:
phrases: economic impact seems | make sense of
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0004_b5466e
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: strong_collocation | phrasal_verb
transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.
expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: {{c1::Back when people were doing}}(回想过去，人们做...的时候) pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything. {{c2::When you do pre-training}}(当你进行预训练的时候), you need all the data.
original: Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything. When you do pre-training, you need all the data.
translation: 以前做预训练的时候，关于用什么数据来训练的问题，这个问题是解决了的，因为这个答案决定了一切。当你进行预训练时，你需要的都是所有这些数据。
note:
phrases: Back when people were doing | When you do pre-training
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0007_c84335
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: discourse_organizer
transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.
expression_transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But there is another explanation. {{c1::Back when people were doing}}(回想过去，人们做...的时候) pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything.
original: But there is another explanation. Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything.
translation: 但还有另一种解释。以前做预训练的时候，关于用什么数据来训练的问题，这个问题也是解决了的，因为这个答案至关重要。
note:
phrases: Back when people were doing
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source:

target_lang: zh

transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.
expression_transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: {{c1::I don’t think anyone knows}}(我想大家可能都不知道) what to do with that. But I think the impact of AI is going to be felt.
original: I don’t think anyone knows what to do with that. But I think the impact of AI is going to be felt.
translation: 我感觉没人知道该如何处理这些数据。但我认为人工智能的影响力，是必然会显现出来的。
note:
phrases: I don’t think anyone knows
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Ilya Sutskever We get used to things pretty fast, {{c1::it turns out}}(结果发现). But also it’s kind of abstract.
original: Ilya Sutskever We get used to things pretty fast, it turns out. But also it’s kind of abstract.
translation: Ilya Sutskever：结果发现，我们适应新事物是非常快的。但同时，它又有点抽象。
note:
phrases: it turns out
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source:

source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: discourse_organizer
transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.
expression_transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: I think your point, about how {{c1::from the average person’s point}}(从普通人的角度来看) of view nothing is that different, will continue being true even into the singularity. Ilya Sutskever No, I don’t think so.
original: I think your point, about how from the average person’s point of view nothing is that different, will continue being true even into the singularity. Ilya Sutskever No, I don’t think so.
translation: 我认为你提出的观点——即从普通人的角度来看，一切都不会有太大不同——即使到了奇点时期，也会继续成立。伊利亚·苏茨克维尔：不，我不这么认为。
note:
phrases: from the average person’s point
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0002_2fe0f2
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: stance_positioning
transfer: Useful for signaling your stance before giving evidence.
expression_transfer: Useful for signaling your stance before giving evidence.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: AI is going to be {{c1::diffused through the economy}}(传导到整个经济体中). There’ll be very strong {{c2::economic forces for this}}(推动这一现象的经济力量), and I think the impact is going to be felt very strongly.
original: AI is going to be diffused through the economy. There’ll be very strong economic forces for this, and I think the impact is going to be felt very strongly.
translation: AI将会渗透到经济的方方面面。这里面会有非常强大的经济驱动力，我认为其影响将会非常显著。
note:
phrases: diffused through the economy | economic forces for this

target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: What does it mean? It means that you see it in the news, that such and such company announced such and such {{c1::dollar amount}}(美元金额). That’s all you see.
original: What does it mean? It means that you see it in the news, that such and such company announced such and such dollar amount. That’s all you see.
translation: 它的意思是？就是你在新闻里看到，某个公司宣布了某个金额的美元数字。你看到的就只有这些。
note:
phrases: dollar amount
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: The {{c1::more whimsical explanation}}(更具奇思妙想的解释) is that maybe RL training makes the models a little too single-minded and narrowly focused, a little bit too unaware, even though it also makes them aware in some other ways. Because of this, they can’t do basic things.
original: The more whimsical explanation is that maybe RL training makes the models a little too single-minded and narrowly focused, a little bit too unaware, even though it also makes them aware in some other ways. Because of this, they can’t do basic things.
translation: 更具推测性的解释是，也许强化学习（RL）训练让模型变得过于专注和狭隘，甚至有点“不自知”，尽管它在其他方面确实提升了模型的感知能力。正因为这一点，它们反而做不了一些基础的事情。
note:
phrases: more whimsical explanation
title: Ilya-Sutskever
